special_mechanics.name: Attack/Defense Mode Toggle
special_mechanics.description: Player can switch between attack mode and defense mode during gameplay

special_mechanics.name: Health Regeneration
special_mechanics.description: Health slowly regenerates when the player stands still (pioneering mechanic for the genre)

tier_notes: Tier 3: No precise movement physics parameters documented in available sources. Game is notable for being an early action-RPG with health regeneration mechanic, but specific velocity, acceleration, gravity, or sub-pixel system data is not publicly available. Sources contain only high-level game design documentation and historical context.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor (tcrf.net) - Hydlide NES article
